schema.description: The representation of an address in Gusto.
schema.title: Location

uuid.description: The UUID of the location object.

version.description: The current version of the object. See the [versioning guide](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/idempotency) for information on how to use this field.

company_uuid.description: The UUID for the company to which the location belongs. Only included if the location belongs to a company.

phone_number.description: The phone number for the location. Required for company locations. Optional for employee locations.

mailing_address.description: Specifies if the location is the company's mailing address. Only included if the location belongs to a company.

filing_address.description: Specifies if the location is the company's filing address. Only included if the location belongs to a company.

created_at.description: Datetime for when location is created

updated_at.description: Datetime for when location is updated

active.description: The status of the location. Inactive locations have been deleted, but may still have historical data associated with them.

inactive.description: The status of the location. Inactive locations have been deleted, but may still have historical data associated with them.

schema.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided ID/UUID is valid.

error_key.description: Specifies where the error occurs. Typically this key identifies the attribute/parameter related to the error.

category.description: Specifies the type of error. The category provides error groupings and can be used to build custom error handling in your integration.

message.description: Provides details about the error - generally this message can be surfaced to an end user.

errors.message: The requested resource was not found.

schema.title: Not-Found-Error-Object
